title: Create Aeronautics: Throwable Rope Connector
description: Create Aeronautics: Throwable Rope Connector is a small quality-of-life addon for Create Aeronautics / Create Simulated that makes docking with rope possible
body:
![Throwable example](https://media2.giphy.com/media/v1.Y2lkPTc5MGI3NjExYjN4cWgxbmZ2YTE4c25uYjR3Z2Vzbnd5dXA0MXFkeDQ4dmwydjU1MSZlcD12MV9pbnRlcm5hbF9naWZfYnlfaWQmY3Q9Zw/OAHB8PhZYZH4icjvb1/giphy.gif)

**Create Aeronautics: Throwable Rope Connector is a small quality-of-life addon for Create Aeronautics / Create Simulated that makes rope docking possible.**

Instead of manually placing a Rope Connector, this mod adds a throwable connector item. Throw it like a snowball, and if it hits a valid block face, it places a normal Create Simulated Rope Connector there.

The item then turns into a normal Rope Coupling that is already linked to that connector, ready to attach to a Rope Winch.

 

#### Features

*   Adds a Throwable Rope Connector item
*   Thrown like a snowball or fire from the Rope Launcher
*   Added item Rope Connector Launcher for longer-range connector placement.
*   Places a normal Create Simulated Rope Connector
*   Converts into a normal Create Simulated Rope Coupling
*   Returned rope is already linked to the placed connector
*   Appears in the same slot after use
*   Failed throws do not consume the item (by default)
*   Configurable throw/launcher distance and velocity

![Shootable example](https://media3.giphy.com/media/v1.Y2lkPTc5MGI3NjExcmpkc20yc3BxbXNpZXYwcnQzN255MzcyZWVsNzhqazA4YWJxZm1heCZlcD12MV9pbnRlcm5hbF9naWZfYnlfaWQmY3Q9Zw/5p05hTK0sd0XvLLua3/giphy.gif)

 

#### How To Use

1.  Craft a Throwable Rope Connector
2.  Craft a Rope Connector Launcher (Optional)
3.  Aim at a valid block face
4.  Right-click to throw the connector or if using the launcher, fire at your target surface with the connector in your other hand.
5.  On success: A Rope Connector is placed and the item becomes a linked Rope Coupling
6.  Right-click a Rope Winch with the Rope Coupling to complete the connection

 

#### Config

```
maxThrowDistance = 20.0
throwVelocity = 1.5
consumeOnSuccessOnly = true
cooldownTicks = 10
playParticles = true
showFailureMessages = true
launcherMaxDistance = 40.0 
showProjectileRopeTrail = true 
projectileRopeTrailWidth = 0.12
```

 

#### Requirements

*   Minecraft 1.21.1
*   NeoForge 21.1.228+
*   Create Aeronautics bundle 1.2.1+
